title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Steel - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Steel - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
